title: FullResults
description: Complete tally and provenance bundle pinned to IPFS at finalization. The blake2b_256 of the canonical JSON of this object equals the on-chain `resultsHash` in the (601) ballot result datum, and the IPFS directory containing this file is referenced by `evidenceCid` in that same datum.

ballotId.description: Ballot identifier (ULID or tx hash). Matches the on-chain (601) datum `ballotId` field and every voter's `signedPayload.ballotId`.

tallies.description: One entry per question. Order matches the original BallotDefinition.questions order.

totalVoters.description: Number of unique voters whose evidence was verified and included. Off-chain only — not present in any on-chain datum.

evidenceIpfsCid.description: IPFS directory CID for the complete evidence package containing this results.json plus all per-voter evidence + proofs. Filled in after the directory is pinned (reads as empty string in any pre-pin draft).

headId.description: Hydra head ID where the votes were collected. Empty string if not available at finalize time.

finalizedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the finalize tx was built (server clock — not chain time).

excludedVoters.description: Voters whose on-chain token existed at settlement but whose evidence could not be verified. Present only when at least one exclusion occurred.

tokenName.description: 29-byte voter token asset name, hex (58 chars).

option.description: Matches a `BallotOption.value` in the source ballot.

count.description: Raw unweighted count of voters who selected this option.

weight.description: Lovelace-denominated weight as a stringified BigInt. '0' for credential-based weighting modes.

weightingMode.description: Mirrors the role's entry in BallotDefinition.roleWeighting.

roleResults.description: Keyed by role label ('DRep', 'SPO', 'CC', 'Stakeholder'). Only roles present in BallotDefinition.roleWeighting appear here.
